zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Collyn於1540年出生在英國肯特希布恩時，她的父親Robert Collyn15歲，母親Margaret Collyn10歲。她於1565年6月3日與William Martin在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年在英國肯特享年55歲，埋葬在英國肯特希布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Collyn于1540年出生在英国肯特希布恩时，她的父亲Robert Collyn15岁，母亲Margaret Collyn10岁。她于1565年6月3日与William Martin在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年在英国肯特享年55岁，埋葬在英国肯特希布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Collyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Leonide, Andre, Armand, Camille, Emile, Fernand, Firmin, Francois, Ghislaine, Normand.
English, French, Walloon, and Breton: variant of   Colin  . This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
German: variant of   Kollin   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Colin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Alfredo, Francisco, Jesus, Ricardo, Alberto, Angel, Arturo, Eduardo, Esteban, Faustino.  French Alexandre, Andre, Armand, Georges, Henri, Jean Claude, Jean-Michel, Laurette, Lucien, Marcel, Patrice, Pierre.
French, Walloon, and Breton: from a French shortened pet form of the personal name   Nicolas   (see   Nicholas  ). This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
English: from the personal name Colin, a diminutive of Col, itself a pet form of Nicholas .

variants.name: Cullen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Declan, Dermot, Donal, Fergus, Aidan, Brennan, Donovan, Eamon, Eamonn, Kieran, Liam.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cuileáin ‘descendant of Cuileán’, a variant of the personal name Coileán meaning ‘puppy’ or ‘young hound’ (see Collin ).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cuilinn ‘descendant of Cuileann’, a byname meaning ‘holly’.

variants.name: Kollin
meanings: German: habitational name from Collin in Brandenburg or Pomerania, Kolline in Silesia, or Kolin in Bohemia. Compare   Collin  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Collyn was born in 1540, in Shipbourne, Kent, England, her father, Robert Collyn, was 15 and her mother, Margaret Collyn, was 10. She married William Martin on 3 June 1565, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1595, in Kent, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Shipbourne, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Collyn est née en 1540, à Shipbourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Robert Collyn, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Margaret Collyn, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé William Martin le 3 juin 1565, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1595, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Shipbourne, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Collyn 1540 in Shipbourne, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Collyn 15 und ihre Mutter Margaret Collyn 10. Sie hat am 3. Juni 1565 in England William Martin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1595 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Shipbourne, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Collyn è nata il nel 1540 nel Shipbourne, Kent, England, sua padre, Robert Collyn, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Margaret Collyn, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato William Martin il 3 giugno 1565, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1595, nel Kent, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Shipbourne, Kent, England.

ja.Shipbourne, Kent, England: イギリスケントシュイプボウルン
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Collynが1540年にイギリスケントシュイプボウルンで生まれた時，父Robert Collynは15歳，母Margaret Collynは10歳であった。1565年6月3日にイギリスでWilliam Martinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1595年にイギリスケントで55歳で死去し，イギリスケントシュイプボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Collyn(이)가 1540년 영국 켄트 시보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Collyn(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Collyn(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1565년 6월 3일 영국에서 William Martin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 영국 켄트에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 시보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Collyn nasceu em 1540, em Shipbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Collyn, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Collyn, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com William Martin em 3 de junho de 1565, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1595, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Shipbourne, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Collyn родилась в 1540 г. в местности шипбурн, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Collyn было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Collyn, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Martin 3 июня 1565 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1595 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности шипбурн, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Collyn nació en 1540, en Shipbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Collyn, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Margaret Collyn, tenía 10 años. Se casó con William Martin el 3 de junio de 1565, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1595, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Shipbourne, Kent, Inglaterra.
